events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since no defects were flagged and the checkpoint scope (rebar placement) appears complete and consistent with the placing drawings, I judged this a **pass** at `rough-complete` stage (~90% complete), with only routine pre-pour verification (cover check, bar cleanliness, housekeeping/tagging) remaining as follow-on actions — low risk, no non-compliant conditions.
